title: diplodium abruptum
intro: Diplodium abruptum, also known as the abrupt orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which contains a compound called cymarin, a cardiac glycoside that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the abrupt orchid include its potential to lower blood pressure, treat heart conditions, and even exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Traditional herbal preparations of the abrupt orchid involve drying and grinding the rhizome, which can then be used to make tea or infusions for medicinal purposes.
